2606.19990.title: Reward as An Agent for Embodied World Models
2606.19990.paper_summary: While RL has become a promising tool for refining world models, existing methods largely rely on conservative rollouts near the training distribution, limiting exploration, behavioral diversity, and richer dynamic discovery. In this work, we challenge this conservative paradigm. We argue that the core limitation is not exploration itself, but the lack of reliable verification strategies to support broader exploration. Without reliable verification, expanded exploration becomes highly susceptible to reward hacking, where policies exploit imperfect rewards without achieving genuine improvement. To evaluate this motivation, we instantiate our method in embodied world models, where physical plausibility, and task completion provide a rigorous testbed for scalable RL under complex dynamics. On the verification side, we introduce Reward as an Agent, an agentic reward framework that actively evaluates generated behaviors to provide robust reward signals and mitigate reward hacking under distribution shifts. On the exploration side, we introduce Dynamic-Aware Rollout Diversification through DynDiff-GRPO, which explicitly expands action-space exploration to diversify trajectories, broaden state-action coverage, and encourage richer embodied behaviors beyond conservative rollout regimes. By unifying Reward as an Agent with DynDiff-GRPO, we enable RL on a more reliable reward foundation with substantially diversified sampling, effectively mitigating reward hacking while yielding significant accuracy gains across multiple open-source world models, thereby demonstrating that broader exploration can scale successfully when grounded in robust verification.
2606.19990.paper_summary_zh: 雖然強化學習（RL）已成為精煉世界模型的有前景工具，但現有方法在很大程度上依賴於接近訓練分佈的保守展開，限制了探索、行為多樣性和更豐富的動態發現。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們挑戰這一保守的範式。<lb/>我們認為核心限制並不是探索本身，而是缺乏可靠的驗證策略來支持更廣泛的探索。<lb/>沒有可靠的驗證，擴展探索變得非常容易受到獎勵操縱的影響，政策利用不完美的獎勵而未能實現真正的改進。<lb/>為了評估這一動機，我們在具體化的世界模型中實現我們的方法，這些模型中物理的合理性和任務完成提供了一個在複雜動態下可擴展強化學習的嚴格測試平台。<lb/>在驗證方面，我們引入了作為代理的獎勵，這是一種主動評估生成行為的獎勵框架，旨在提供穩健的獎勵信號並減輕在分佈變化下的獎勵操縱。<lb/>在探索方面，我們通過DynDiff-GRPO引入動態感知的展開多樣化，這明確擴展了動作空間探索，以多樣化軌跡、擴大狀態-動作覆蓋範圍，並鼓勵超越保守展開範疇的更豐富的具身行為。<lb/>通過將作為代理的獎勵與DynDiff-GRPO統一，我們使強化學習建立在更可靠的獎勵基礎上，實現了實質上多樣化的抽樣，有效減輕了獎勵操縱，同時在多個開源世界模型上獲得顯著的準確性提升，從而證明了當建立在穩健的驗證基礎上時，更廣泛的探索可以成功擴展。
2606.19990.author: Pu Li et.al.
2606.19990.authors: Pu Li, Zhigang Lin, Qiang Wu, Yongxuan Lv, Fei Wang, Shan You
